full_text:
Quan Shang (Zizhen) 全尚 (子真)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Shang (全尚), styledZizhen (子真). Was killed after his wife revealed his son’s plot against Sun Chen. Quan Shang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Quan Shang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
